```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.85em;justify-content:center;opacity:0.8;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#FFFFFF;padding:0.25em 0.65em;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;transform:rotate(-2deg);">new model</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#FFFFFF;padding:0.25em 0.65em;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;transform:rotate(1deg);">new framework</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#FFFFFF;padding:0.25em 0.65em;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;transform:rotate(-1deg);">5 must-install tools</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#FFFFFF;padding:0.25em 0.65em;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;transform:rotate(2deg);">10× productivity</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#FFFFFF;padding:0.25em 0.65em;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #E0DBE5;transform:rotate(-1deg);">SDK rewrite</span>
 </div>

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#C4C3E8;letter-spacing:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.7em;">▼ ▼ ▼</div>

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.4em 1.5em;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.6em;">— the reframe —</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.95em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.45;">
   Don't chase releases.<br>
   Build a workflow that <span style="color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">works for you</span>.
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  "Everyone has their developing flow." — Karpathy
 </div>

</div>
```
